revision.comment: Bot: create automatic enwiki redirect
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Ancient international relations]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Ancient international relations]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

revision.comment: Bot: sync with enwiki
revision.text:
{{navbox |title=Ancient international relations |listclass = hlist |name= Ancient international relations |list1= * [[Ancient China–India relations]] * [[Ancient Greece–Ancient India relations]] * [[Indo-Roman relations]] * [[Indus–Mesopotamia relations]] * [[Roman relations with the Armenians|Roman–Armenian relations]] * [[Roman–Iranian relations]] * [[Roman relations with Nubia|Roman–Nubian relations]] * [[Sino-Roman relations]] }}<noinclude> {{documentation|content= This template links to articles about international relations.
[[Category:Foreign relations by country templates]] [[Category:Politics and government templates]] }} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Politics and government templates
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:qq]]"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23124421395|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
Bot: tag page without wikidata link [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24744680692|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ancient_international_relations here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ancient_international_relations for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{navbox |title=Ancient international relations |listclass = hlist |name= Ancient international relations |list1= * [[:en:Ancient China–India relations|Ancient China–India relations]] * [[:en:Ancient Greece–Ancient India relations|Ancient Greece–Ancient India relations]] * [[Indo-Roman relations]] * [[Indus–Mesopotamia relations]] * [[Roman relations with the Armenians|Roman–Armenian relations]] * [[Roman–Iranian relations]] * [[Roman relations with Nubia|Roman–Nubian relations]] * [[Sino-Roman relations]] }}<noinclude> {{documentation|content= This template links to articles about international relations.
[[Category:Foreign relations by country templates]]
}}
